purpose: Trace the movement of money — budgets, funding sources, allocations, expenditures, and financial flows between entities.
writingRules: All figures must include source and fiscal year
Show both absolute numbers and percentage of total
Trace money from source to destination — who pays and who receives
Use consistent currency formatting (₹ with Cr/L/Cr notation)
seoRules: Table data should use schema.org Table markup
Key allocation figures should appear in paragraph text
Use StatisticalPopulation schema for per-capita figures
